objective: Commit the HELLO-BUG-002 fix: --shout now upper-cases formal greetings, plus a standalone regression guard.
key_changes: hello.py:15 guard restored to 'if shout:' so shouting applies to both formal and informal greetings.
Added tests/test_shout_formal.py — standalone CliRunner regression guard (no pytest), run via 'python3 tests/test_shout_formal.py'.
Bug status transitioned in-progress -> fixed; full Path B artifact set committed (force-added past the engineering/ ignore rule).
Net hello.py diff is empty: HEAD already carried the fix; the working tree had reintroduced the bug and is now restored.
